product_overview: A RESTful blog backend built with Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, and MongoDB that supports secure user authentication, blog post CRUD, image uploads, and Swagger-based API documentation. It is designed as an educational reference implementation demonstrating modern backend development practices.
core_goals: Provide secure user registration and login with JWT authentication
Enable public blog browsing and authenticated blog post creation
Support author-only blog post updates and deletion
Allow optional image uploads for blog posts with file validation
Deliver interactive Swagger/OpenAPI documentation for all endpoints
Demonstrate clean, scalable TypeScript backend architecture

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to register and log in to receive JWT tokens for accessing protected endpoints.
user_flows: POST /user/register with valid name, email, and password -> Receive 201 with created user and JWT token -> Use token for authenticated blog actions
POST /user/register with an email that already exists -> Receive 409 with user already exists error
POST /user/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with user and JWT token -> Use token for protected requests
POST /user/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 with invalid credentials error

features.name: Blog Post Management
features.description: Lets users create, view, update, and delete blog posts, with authorization enforced for modifying content.
user_flows: POST /blog/post with valid JWT token and form-data title/content/image -> Receive 201 with created blog post -> GET /blog/posts -> Receive 200 with list of blog posts -> GET /blog/post/{id} -> Receive 200 with the selected blog post
POST /blog/post without JWT token -> Receive 401 unauthorized error
PUT /blog/post/{id} with valid JWT token from the post author and updated form-data fields -> Receive 200 with updated blog post
PUT /blog/post/{id} with valid JWT token from a non-author user -> Receive 403 forbidden error
DELETE /blog/post/{id} with valid JWT token from the post author or admin -> Receive 200 with deleted blog post
GET /blog/post/{id} for a missing post ID -> Receive 404 blog post not found error

features.name: API Documentation
features.description: Provides interactive Swagger UI documentation for exploring and testing the API endpoints.
user_flows: GET /api-docs -> Receive 200 with Swagger UI page showing documented endpoints
GET /api-docs when the documentation service is unavailable -> Receive an error response indicating the docs page cannot be loaded

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: User registration and login with JWT token issuance.

endpoints.description: Authenticate an existing user and return JWT.

features.name: Blog Post Management
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete blog posts with role/author authorization.

endpoints.description: Create a blog post with optional image upload.
Fetch a single blog post by ID.
Update a blog post by ID (author/admin only).
Delete a blog post by ID (author/admin only).

features.name: API Documentation
features.description: Swagger UI endpoint serving OpenAPI docs generated from route annotations.

known_limitations.issue: Login lookup does not normalize email case before querying.
known_limitations.impact: Users can fail to log in when email casing differs from stored lowercase value.

known_limitations.issue: No automated unit/integration test suite configured in package scripts.
known_limitations.impact: Regressions are harder to catch before deployment.

known_limitations.issue: Database config throws message for MONGO_URI while reading DB_URI.
known_limitations.impact: Misleading setup/debugging information for environment configuration.
